channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Evanescence @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-07-21 02:00 — Evanescence at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Evanescence's return with Spiritbox and Nova Twins promises a powerful night of rock and emotional performances.

item.title: Lionel Richie @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-08-07 02:30 — Lionel Richie at Chase Center. Lionel Richie and Earth, Wind & Fire bring a nostalgic blend of classic hits that will resonate with a wide audience.

item.title: ZAYN @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-03 03:00 — ZAYN at Chase Center. ZAYN's tour is highly anticipated following his successful solo career, attracting a dedicated fanbase.

item.title: i-dle @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-22 03:00 — i-dle at Oakland Arena. i-dle's world tour showcases their rising popularity in the K-pop scene, promising an energetic performance.

item.title: Gorillaz @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — Gorillaz at Oakland Arena. Gorillaz's innovative live shows are known for their unique visuals and engaging performances.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-16 02:30 → 2026-10-18 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose.

item.title: Tori Amos @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-30 03:00 — Tori Amos at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tori Amos's intimate performances are always a treat, showcasing her storytelling and musical prowess.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's laid-back style and connection with fans make his shows a relaxing and enjoyable experience.

item.title: John Mellencamp @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-13 03:00 — John Mellencamp at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Godsmack's hard-hitting rock sound is sure to energize the audience, appealing to rock enthusiasts.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tedeschi Trucks Band's blend of blues and rock is renowned for their captivating live performances.

item.title: Bleachers @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-18 01:30 — Bleachers at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bleachers' energetic performances and catchy tunes are a highlight for fans of modern pop-rock.

item.title: Screeching Weasel @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-09-02 03:00 — Screeching Weasel at August Hall. Courtney Barnett's unique voice and lyrical storytelling make her shows a must-see for indie music fans.

item.title: Santana @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-10 02:00 — Santana at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Mumford & Sons' folk-rock sound continues to resonate, promising a memorable night for fans.

item.title: Bonnie Raitt @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-11 03:00 — Bonnie Raitt at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Bonnie Raitt's legendary status and soulful performances attract a diverse audience.

item.title: The Neighbourhood @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — The Neighbourhood at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Neighbourhood's unique sound and engaging stage presence make their shows highly anticipated.

item.title: Old 97's @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-08-06 03:00 — Old 97's at The Fillmore. Old 97's have a loyal following, and their live shows are known for their high energy and engaging performances.

item.title: AC/DC @ Levi's® Stadium
item.description: 2026-08-06 02:00 — AC/DC at Levi's® Stadium. Arlo Parks' rise in the music scene and her soulful sound make her a compelling act to see live.
